narrative:
Washington Twp. township has 112 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
